## Ontology Overview

**Abbreviation:**

## Scope and Purpose

Provide a concise abstract describing the ontology’s purpose, domain coverage, 
and intended users. Highlight how it is related to the energy domain.

## Workflow checklist

- [ ] I am aware of the workflow in [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/OEOFoundry/OEOFoundry/blob/production/CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I am aware of OEO Foundry [principles](https://oeofoundry.github.io/OEOFoundry/principles/)
